Title: Invalid Email Accepted in Quote Request Form
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open Quote Request Form.
2. Enter invalid email (ghhjj).
3. Continue.

Title: API Request Returns 401 Unauthorized
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Fill rental request form.
2. Submit request.
Actual Result: API returns 401 Unauthorized (POST request to Supabase API failed).

Title: Login Page Displays Invalid API Key
Expected Result: Login page should load without backend errors.

Title: Registration Fails Due to Invalid API Key
Actual Result: Registration blocked with Invalid API Key error.

Title: Google OAuth Redirect Failure
Expected Result: User redirected back to application after Google login.
